title: GitOps with ArgoCD & Flux
learningObjectives: Understand GitOps principles and the pull-based deployment model
Configure ArgoCD Applications to sync from Git
Use Flux Kustomization and HelmRelease resources
Implement progressive delivery and rollback strategies

theory.content:
What is GitOps?

GitOps is an operational framework that uses Git as the single source of truth for declarative infrastructure and applications. Changes are made via Git commits and pull requests; an automated agent reconciles the cluster to match the Git state.

GitOps Principles (OpenGitOps)

  • Declarative: All desired state is expressed declaratively
  • Versioned & Immutable: Git history is the audit trail
  • Pulled automatically: Software agents pull desired state (not push)
  • Continuously reconciled: Agents self-heal drift from desired state

ArgoCD

ArgoCD is a declarative GitOps tool for Kubernetes. It watches Git repos and syncs Application resources to clusters.

# ArgoCD Application
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: myapp
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  project: default
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/myrepo
    targetRevision: HEAD
    path: k8s/overlays/production
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
    namespace: myapp
  syncPolicy:
    automated:
      prune: true
      selfHeal: true
    syncOptions:
      - CreateNamespace=true

Flux CD (v2)

Flux v2 uses a set of controllers (GitRepository, Kustomization, HelmRelease) as CRDs.

# GitRepository source
apiVersion: source.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1
kind: GitRepository
metadata:
  name: myrepo
  namespace: flux-system
spec:
  interval: 1m
  url: https://github.com/myorg/myrepo
  ref:
    branch: main
---
# Kustomization
apiVersion: kustomize.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1
kind: Kustomization
metadata:
  name: myapp
  namespace: flux-system
spec:
  interval: 10m
  path: ./k8s/production
  prune: true
  sourceRef:
    kind: GitRepository
    name: myrepo

Image Automation

Flux can automatically update image tags in Git when new images are pushed to a registry, enabling fully automated delivery pipelines.

Progressive Delivery with Argo Rollouts

Argo Rollouts extends Kubernetes with advanced deployment strategies: Canary (route % of traffic to new version) and Blue-Green (switch traffic at once after verification).
